description: Version compatibility matrix for all ARTHA capabilities. All capabilities currently share the same version (1.0.0) and are compatible with each other.

ARTHA-LEDGER-001.name: Ledger Engine
ARTHA-LEDGER-001.breaking_change_policy: MAJOR version bump required for breaking input/output schema changes
ARTHA-LEDGER-001.backward_compatibility: MINOR version bumps for new optional fields, PATCH for bug fixes

ARTHA-AUDIT-001.name: Audit Engine
ARTHA-AUDIT-001.breaking_change_policy: MAJOR version bump required for breaking changes
ARTHA-AUDIT-001.backward_compatibility: New event types can be added as MINOR bumps

ARTHA-TRACE-001.name: Trace Engine
ARTHA-TRACE-001.breaking_change_policy: MAJOR version bump for new stage types or trace_id format changes
ARTHA-TRACE-001.backward_compatibility: New stages can be added as MINOR bumps

ARTHA-EVIDENCE-001.name: Evidence Engine
ARTHA-EVIDENCE-001.breaking_change_policy: MAJOR version bump for proof_type changes
ARTHA-EVIDENCE-001.backward_compatibility: New proof types can be added as MINOR bumps

ARTHA-OBSERVE-001.name: Observability Engine
ARTHA-OBSERVE-001.breaking_change_policy: MAJOR version bump for metrics format changes
ARTHA-OBSERVE-001.backward_compatibility: New metrics can be added as MINOR bumps

ARTHA-FINREPORT-001.name: Financial Reporting Engine
ARTHA-FINREPORT-001.breaking_change_policy: MAJOR version bump for report format changes
ARTHA-FINREPORT-001.backward_compatibility: New report types can be added as MINOR bumps

ARTHA-SIGNAL-001.name: Compliance Signal Engine
ARTHA-SIGNAL-001.breaking_change_policy: MAJOR version bump for signal type changes
ARTHA-SIGNAL-001.backward_compatibility: New signal types can be added as MINOR bumps

ARTHA-MULTICOMPANY-001.name: Multi-Company Engine
ARTHA-MULTICOMPANY-001.breaking_change_policy: MAJOR version bump for company schema changes
ARTHA-MULTICOMPANY-001.backward_compatibility: New company fields can be added as MINOR bumps

ARTHA-TALLY-001.name: Tally Compatibility Engine
ARTHA-TALLY-001.breaking_change_policy: MAJOR version bump for XML format changes
ARTHA-TALLY-001.backward_compatibility: New voucher types can be added as MINOR bumps

cross_compatibility.mutual_compatibility: All v1.0.0 capabilities are mutually compatible
cross_compatibility.upgrade_policy: All capabilities must be upgraded together if any MAJOR version bump occurs
